name: ai-voice-studio
title: AI Voice Studio
description: Read and generate speech from Raycast with MiniMax, Xiaomi MiMo, and OpenAI voices, TTS Studio controls, speed control, resume, and voice cloning.
author: xianwei_zhang

commands.name: quick-read
commands.title: Quick Read
commands.subtitle: AI Voice Studio
commands.description: Read selected text, or clipboard text if no selection is available, with the default TTS provider. Trigger again to stop.

commands.name: configure-providers
commands.title: Configure Voice Providers
commands.subtitle: AI Voice Studio
commands.description: Configure the default provider and OpenAI model, voice, format, speed, and speaking instructions.

commands.name: resume-reading
commands.title: Resume Last Reading
commands.subtitle: MiniMax
commands.description: Resume the previous MiniMax reading from the next unfinished chunk.

commands.name: restart-reading
commands.title: Restart Last Reading
commands.subtitle: MiniMax
commands.description: Restart the previous MiniMax reading from the beginning.

commands.name: read-with-voice
commands.title: Read with MiniMax Voice
commands.subtitle: MiniMax
commands.description: Browse MiniMax voices and read selected text aloud.

commands.name: select-voice
commands.title: Set MiniMax Quick Read Voice
commands.subtitle: MiniMax
commands.description: Choose and preview the MiniMax voice used by Quick Read when MiniMax is the default provider.

commands.name: clone-voice
commands.title: Clone MiniMax Voice
commands.subtitle: MiniMax
commands.description: Upload audio and create a cloned MiniMax voice.

commands.name: tts-studio
commands.title: TTS Studio
commands.subtitle: MiMo
commands.description: Generate and play MiMo speech from typed, selected, or pasted text, with voice, emotion, and style controls.

commands.name: mimo-quick-read
commands.title: Quick Read with MiMo
commands.subtitle: MiMo
commands.description: Read selected or clipboard text with your default MiMo voice. Run again to stop playback.

commands.name: mimo-read-with-voice
commands.title: Read with MiMo Voice
commands.subtitle: MiMo
commands.description: Browse MiMo voices and read selected or clipboard text aloud.

commands.name: mimo-select-voice
commands.title: Set MiMo Quick Read Voice
commands.subtitle: MiMo
commands.description: Choose and preview the MiMo voice used by Quick Read when MiMo is the default provider.

commands.name: openai-quick-read
commands.title: Quick Read with OpenAI
commands.subtitle: OpenAI
commands.description: Read selected or clipboard text with your default OpenAI voice. Run again to stop playback.

commands.name: openai-read-with-voice
commands.title: Read with OpenAI Voice
commands.subtitle: OpenAI
commands.description: Browse OpenAI voices and read selected or clipboard text aloud.

commands.name: openai-select-voice
commands.title: Set OpenAI Quick Read Voice
commands.subtitle: OpenAI
commands.description: Choose and preview the OpenAI voice used by Quick Read when OpenAI is the default provider.

commands.name: speed-up-reading
commands.title: Increase Reading Speed
commands.subtitle: AI Voice Studio
commands.description: Increase reading speed by 0.25x for the default provider.

commands.name: slow-down-reading
commands.title: Decrease Reading Speed
commands.subtitle: AI Voice Studio
commands.description: Decrease reading speed by 0.25x for the default provider.

commands.name: playback-status
commands.title: MiniMax Reading Status
commands.subtitle: MiniMax
commands.description: Menu-bar status of the current MiniMax reading with controls.

commands.name: mimo-status
commands.title: MiMo Reading Status
commands.subtitle: MiMo
commands.description: Show MiMo playback status, speed, and controls in the menu bar.

preferences.name: authMode
preferences.title: MiniMax Authentication Mode
preferences.description: Choose which MiniMax key type to use

preferences.name: tokenPlanKey
preferences.title: MiniMax Token Plan Key
preferences.description: MiniMax Token Plan subscription key. Token Plan currently supports HD models only (Turbo requires the Open Platform key).

preferences.name: model
preferences.title: MiniMax Model
preferences.description: Token Plan supports HD models only. Turbo models require the Open Platform API Key.

preferences.name: defaultVoice
preferences.title: MiniMax Default Voice
preferences.description: Voice used for Quick Read command

preferences.name: customDefaultVoice
preferences.title: MiniMax Default Custom Voice ID
preferences.description: Optional cloned or generated voice ID. Overrides Default Voice and appears in voice pickers. Get IDs from the Clone Voice command or your MiniMax dashboard.

preferences.name: customVoiceIds
preferences.title: MiniMax Extra Custom Voice IDs
preferences.description: Comma-separated cloned or generated voice IDs to show in voice pickers (in addition to the default).

preferences.name: mimoApiKey
preferences.title: MiMo Token Plan API Key
preferences.description: Your Xiaomi MiMo Token Plan API key. Starts with tp-.

preferences.name: mimoTokenPlanBaseUrl
preferences.title: MiMo Token Plan Base URL
preferences.description: OpenAI-compatible Token Plan base URL from your MiMo subscription page.

preferences.name: mimoDefaultVoice
preferences.title: MiMo Default Voice
preferences.description: Voice used by Quick Read when MiMo is the default provider.

preferences.name: mimoSpeechRate
preferences.title: MiMo Speech Rate
preferences.description: Default speed guidance sent to MiMo. Can be overridden per playback.

preferences.name: mimoStylePrompt
preferences.title: MiMo Speaking Style
preferences.description: Optional natural-language style guidance sent to MiMo with every request.
preferences.placeholder: Natural, clear, and restrained; suitable for long-form reading.

preferences.name: openaiApiKey
preferences.title: OpenAI API Key
preferences.description: Your OpenAI API key for the Speech API.
